lines.text: The range breathes easier without those husks. Thank you, child.
The husks are gone? Then there is hope for us yet.
Rest now. The road ahead is longer than you know.
The husks still wander the range. Be careful out there.
The colour ran out of the meadow, child. You can see it, can't you?
The husks that wander this range were people once. Put them to rest — all three.
Best. Kite. EVER. When I grow up I'm going to fly one on every roof!
MY KITE! You found it! You're the best grey-fighter ever!
The wind took it east, past the old passage. It's teal with a long tail — you can't miss it!
My kite! The wind grabbed it and dragged it east, through the passage!
Please bring it back? It's the only colourful thing I have left.
